component.name: Kotonoha
Kotonoha 歌词 HUD
Kotonoha 歌詞 HUD
Kotonoha 歌詞 HUD
component.summary: Synchronized lyrics overlay for MPRIS media players
为 MPRIS 播放器显示同步歌词的悬浮窗

description.p: Kotonoha is a translucent, click-through, always-on-top Wayland overlay showing word-by-word synced lyrics for whatever you are playing. It reads now-playing metadata from any MPRIS player over D-Bus and fetches timed lyrics from Netease, lrclib, and optionally the Cider Apple Music plugin.

ul.li: Word-by-word karaoke sweep with an optional translation line
Multi-source, user-ordered lyric providers with a local cache
Floats above fullscreen via wlr-layer-shell (KDE/wlroots); GNOME falls back to a normal top window
